list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() -> data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e -> | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test -> green Confirm / red Save Anyway

component.name: FlaskConsoleOptions

option.name: myCustomStartScript

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Flask server.Network-bulk-configuration.executor": "Run", "Python tests.Python tests in test.py.executor": "Run", "Python tests.Python tests in test_rate_limit.py.executor": "Run", "Python.Core.executor": "Run", "Python.Helper.executor": "Run", "Python.Network-bulk-configuration.executor": "Run", "Python.WebApp.executor": "Run", "Python.db.executor": "Run", "Python.db_install.executor": "Run", "Python.tables.executor": "Run", "Python.webapp.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/itama/Documents/Coding/Network-bulk-configuration/templates", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "postgresql" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Split Helper to Modules
Fosnihed OOP architecture and organised webapp
improved verifiction pipeline
improved verifiction pipeline
refacotred files and connected CLI to cancellation flow
Bug Fixes and method refactoring
Bug Fixes and method refactoring
Addd DB support infrasturcture
Bug fixes
removedternary expression in cancel event initalization
minor bug fixes
insalled flask-login and setrouts foruser auth
Added usr authenitcation to webapp
Added usr authenitcation to webapp
Added usr authenitcation to webapp
updated documenation and addd user lgoin ad regitration
updated documenation and addd user lgoin ad regitration
● Auth routes: implement /login and /register with password hashing and integrity error handling
● Auth pipeline: add register/account templates, factory admin seeding, UUID primary key on User
● Auth pipeline: implement TOTP enrollment and verification with QR code and animated OTP input
● Auth pipeline: implement TOTP enrollment and verification with QR code and animated OTP input
● Auth pipeline: fix TOTP secret persistence, complete dark mode, polish OTP timer display
● Auth pipeline: admin panel with user management, approval flow, and collapsible sidebar
bug fixes
● Phase 1 complete: fix admin_user_action endpoint name, home button redirect for authenticated users, dark mode account page text
● Phase 1 complete: fix admin_user_action endpoint name, home button redirect for authenticated users, dark mode account page text

refactor: implement Phase 2 execution pipeline
- Add RolloutJob and RolloutOrchestrator (orchestration.py) - Refactor RolloutEngine: cancel_event and logger injected at call time, methods privatized - Refactor RolloutLogger: webapp/verbose baked in at construction - Refactor Validator: logger injected, instance methods for error-surfacing validation - Rename parser.py → input_parser.py, add logger to InputParser constructor - Implement Device.from_inventory() with Fernet decryption from SecurityProfile - Rewire webapp routes as thin orchestrator delegators, remove cancel_event global - Fix and uncomment all disabled tests — 83/83 passing - Update architecture.md to reflect deviations from original design
updated attrbiute specifications
updated attrbiute specifications

Phase 2 completion: DB integration, operator UI, admin bulk actions, CLI rewrite
- Orchestrator DB writes fully wired: RolloutSession on submit/dispatch, DeviceResult rows + session cleanup on job completion - DeviceResultDict TypedDict introduced in core.py for typed run() return - tables.py: fixed all ForeignKeys (users.id), cascade delete-orphan on all User relationships, commands_verified Mapped[int | None], security_profile singular on Inventory, started_at added to DeviceResult - Operator sidebar: Security Profiles zone (bi-shield-lock), Admin entry (bi-gear), conditional render for admins only - Admin user management rebuilt: multi-select toolbar, per-action rules engine, contextual tooltips, bulk backend route, delete modal with count confirmation - cli.py rewritten to use new architecture: InputParser.prepare_devices(), RolloutLogger, RolloutEngine.run(cancel, logger) - db_install.py: create_all limitation documented, Alembic migration noted for Phase 4 - workplan, architecture, CLAUDE.md, memory updated to reflect current state

● Security hardening: CSRF protection, OTP encryption, rate limit test
- Flask-WTF CSRFProtect wired; csrf_token added to all POST forms (login, register, otp_enroll, otp_verify, upload, cancel_rollout, admin bulk action) - otp_secret encrypted at enrollment via encryption.encrypt(), decrypted before pyotp.TOTP() at verify — column widened to varchar(255) - cancel_event, SECRET_KEY, DOM credentials, rate limiting bugs marked fixed in bug_report.md - RateLimitIntegrationTest added to test.py (skipped if server not running), standalone test_rate_limit.py removed
● Implement Security Profiles UI — CRUD, encrypted credentials, connection test

Complete Phase 2: inventory CRUD, security profiles UI, operator zone
Operator zone (operator_base.html, dashboard, account, security, inventory): - Security profiles: full CRUD + test connection (Netmiko via Device class) - Inventory: card grid with Simple Icons vendor badges, FortiGate hover tooltip, NrSelect dropdown, variable attributes expand section (9 fields incl. vrfs list), security profile drag-assign from split-view modal - Inventory backend: create, edit, delete, bulk_assign — all ownership-guarded
Schema: - Inventory.var_maps JSON column, Device.extra dict, VariableMapping.index nullable int (positional vrfs substitution)
Form validation site-wide: - novalidate + .field-error divs with contextual messages on all forms - CSS :has() rule handles password inputs inside .pw-group wrappers - Shake-on-submit JS + validation CSS added to base.html (covers login page)
Docs: workplan and architecture updated, Phase 2 marked complete

● Implement variable mappings: UI, backend, schema (3.1)
- variable_mappings.html: card grid, add/edit/delete modals, split-view drag-assign with eligible pool filtered by truthy attribute value - var_mapping_to_devices join table: many-to-many VariableMapping <-> Inventory - UniqueConstraint(token, user_id) on VariableMapping, cascade delete on devices - Validator: validate_var_map_inner_token, validate_var_map_property_name, validate_var_index (static, return tuple[bool, str|None]) - Routes: GET /mappings, create, edit, delete, bulk_assign with ownership and eligibility guards - UUID converter on all ID routes app-wide, manual casts removed - DB: index column on variable_mappings, unique constraint, var_mapping_to_devices table, index dropped from rollout_sessions

Add CSV import to inventory and variable mappings (3.1, 3.1b)
- variable_mappings.html: card grid, drag-assign split modal, NrSelect attribute picker, resolved value shown in drag cards - var_mapping_to_devices join table, UniqueConstraint(token, user_id), cascade delete on VariableMapping.devices - Validator: 3 static mapping validators returning (bool, str|None) - Routes: /mappings GET/create/edit/delete/bulk_assign with ownership and eligibility guards (truthy attribute value check) - UUID converter on all ID routes app-wide, manual casts removed - inventory/import_csv: multipart upload, temp file handling, InputParser.csv_to_inventory, logger queue drain, both temp files cleaned up in finally block - Import CSV button + modal added to inventory page

Fix innerHTML XSS in rollout log output
html.escape() applied to user-controlled message content in RolloutLogger._msg() before HTML color wrapping. Prevents device hostnames or command output containing HTML from executing in the browser. Bug report updated — one open item remaining (SSE completion signal).

Implemented device-aware variable substitution and completed the new rollout execution pipeline.
Core changes:
Variable Mapping - Added runtime substitution support in RolloutEngine. - Device objects now carry: - `extra` device attributes (from Inventory.var_maps) - `var_map_subs` mapping tokens to attribute lookups. - Implemented `_substitute_commands()` to resolve tokens per device before execution. - Supports indexed attributes (e.g. VRF lists). - Substitution applied consistently during both push and verification phases.
Device Construction - Extended `Device.from_inventory()` to translate ORM relationships into runtime structures. - Mappings from `VariableMapping` are converted into token → (property, index) dictionaries.
Rollout Engine - Push stage now executes device-specific command lists. - Verification stage updated to evaluate substituted commands. - Removed unnecessary deepcopy usage for command lists.
Rollout Web Backend - Implemented new `/new_rollout` and `/new_start_rollout` routes. - Allows selecting inventory devices and submitting commands via text input or file upload. - Builds runtime `Device` objects via InputParser. - Submits rollout jobs through the orchestrator.
Architecture - Maintained clean boundary between ORM models and runtime execution layer. - Device substitution logic remains independent of database access. - Rollout jobs continue to be managed via the in-memory orchestrator registry.
Documentation / Readability - Added structured comments explaining rollout route stages.
● "Implement Phase 3.2: multi-platform rollout, active jobs screen, log streaming, rollback, job metadata audit trail with pg_cron retention, and results page"

Phase 3.4 — audit trail, results enhancements, log file infrastructure
- Add AuditLog ORM model with 90-day pg_cron retention - Instrument 21 routes with audit() writes (auth, user mgmt, inventory, security profiles, variable mappings, rollout lifecycle) - Add /admin/audit filterable log viewer with FortiGate-style gear per row - Remove legacy upload/rollout routes and templates (pre-Phase 3.2) - Fix admin panel back button pointing to old upload route - Wire RolloutLogger to LOGS_DIR (src/../logs/) with job_id+timestamp naming - Add Download Log and See Commands buttons to results page - Add client-side LCS diff modal for comparing commands between two jobs

Phase 3.4 — audit trail, results enhancements, log file infrastructure
- Add AuditLog ORM model with 90-day pg_cron retention - Instrument 21 routes with audit() writes (auth, user mgmt, inventory, security profiles, variable mappings, rollout lifecycle) - Add /admin/audit filterable log viewer with FortiGate-style gear per row - Remove legacy upload/rollout routes and templates (pre-Phase 3.2) - Fix admin panel back button pointing to old upload route - Wire RolloutLogger to LOGS_DIR (src/../logs/) with job_id+timestamp naming - Add Download Log and See Commands buttons to results page - Add client-side LCS diff modal for comparing commands between two jobs

Device-level concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger fully thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock added, get_buffer_snapshot() for race-free SSE replay.
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users collapsible sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge on other users' rows. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, and log download.

Phase 3.6 — concurrency, admin all-users view, audit fix, UI polish
Two-layer concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock, get_buffer_snapshot().
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, log download.
AuditLog.detail JSONB column added (was accepted by audit() helper but never stored or surfaced in the View Detail modal).
Dashboard buttons: Launch Rollout solid cyan fill, other actions cyan outline. Sidebar reorganised into three labelled sections — Operation, Management, Observability — with Admin Panel inside Observability.

Phase 3.6 — concurrency, admin all-users view, audit fix, UI polish
Two-layer concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock, get_buffer_snapshot().
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, log download.
AuditLog.detail JSONB column added (was accepted by audit() helper but never stored or surfaced in the View Detail modal).
Dashboard buttons: Launch Rollout solid cyan fill, other actions cyan outline. Sidebar reorganised into three labelled sections — Operation, Management, Observability — with Admin Panel inside Observability.

Phase 3.6 — concurrency, admin all-users view, audit fix, UI polish
Two-layer concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock, get_buffer_snapshot().
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, log download.
AuditLog.detail JSONB column added (was accepted by audit() helper but never stored or surfaced in the View Detail modal).
Dashboard buttons: Launch Rollout solid cyan fill, other actions cyan outline. Sidebar reorganised into three labelled sections — Operation, Management, Observability — with Admin Panel inside Observability.

tests: enable and adapt full unit test suite to current architecture
Re-enable all _DISABLED test classes and adapt them to the Phase 2/3 architecture. Fix RolloutLogger constructor usage (logfile= param removed), update _push_config assertions for (cancel_signal, push_results) tuple return, update _verify for ThreadPoolExecutor-based API (cancel removed), update run() assertions for list[DeviceResultDict] return type. Fix _server_reachable bug (was returning True on ConnectionRefusedError, skipping rate limit test incorrectly).
82 tests passing, 1 skipped (rate limit integration — requires live server). webapp.py and cli.py intentionally uncovered — next session.

feat(inventory): TCP connection test on device creation
Add device modal now requires a connection test before saving. A 'Test Connection' button (grey) fires POST /inventory/test_connection, which runs Validator.test_tcp_port against the supplied IP and port. On success the button turns green ('Confirm') and a status pill shows the result; on failure it turns red ('Save Anyway') so the user can still persist an unreachable device. Editing IP or port after a test resets the button to prevent confirming a stale result.

fix + feat: first-rollout fixes, results page overhaul, edit-device test button
Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() → data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e → | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw " quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test → green Confirm / red Save Anyway

Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() -> data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e -> | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test -> green Confirm / red Save Anyway

MESSAGE.value: ● Auth pipeline: add register/account templates, factory admin seeding, UUID primary key on User
● Auth pipeline: implement TOTP enrollment and verification with QR code and animated OTP input
● Auth pipeline: fix TOTP secret persistence, complete dark mode, polish OTP timer display
● Auth pipeline: admin panel with user management, approval flow, and collapsible sidebar
bug fixes
● Phase 1 complete: fix admin_user_action endpoint name, home button redirect for authenticated users, dark mode account page text

refactor: implement Phase 2 execution pipeline
- Add RolloutJob and RolloutOrchestrator (orchestration.py) - Refactor RolloutEngine: cancel_event and logger injected at call time, methods privatized - Refactor RolloutLogger: webapp/verbose baked in at construction - Refactor Validator: logger injected, instance methods for error-surfacing validation - Rename parser.py → input_parser.py, add logger to InputParser constructor - Implement Device.from_inventory() with Fernet decryption from SecurityProfile - Rewire webapp routes as thin orchestrator delegators, remove cancel_event global - Fix and uncomment all disabled tests — 83/83 passing - Update architecture.md to reflect deviations from original design
updated attrbiute specifications

Phase 2 completion: DB integration, operator UI, admin bulk actions, CLI rewrite
- Orchestrator DB writes fully wired: RolloutSession on submit/dispatch, DeviceResult rows + session cleanup on job completion - DeviceResultDict TypedDict introduced in core.py for typed run() return - tables.py: fixed all ForeignKeys (users.id), cascade delete-orphan on all User relationships, commands_verified Mapped[int | None], security_profile singular on Inventory, started_at added to DeviceResult - Operator sidebar: Security Profiles zone (bi-shield-lock), Admin entry (bi-gear), conditional render for admins only - Admin user management rebuilt: multi-select toolbar, per-action rules engine, contextual tooltips, bulk backend route, delete modal with count confirmation - cli.py rewritten to use new architecture: InputParser.prepare_devices(), RolloutLogger, RolloutEngine.run(cancel, logger) - db_install.py: create_all limitation documented, Alembic migration noted for Phase 4 - workplan, architecture, CLAUDE.md, memory updated to reflect current state

● Security hardening: CSRF protection, OTP encryption, rate limit test
- Flask-WTF CSRFProtect wired; csrf_token added to all POST forms (login, register, otp_enroll, otp_verify, upload, cancel_rollout, admin bulk action) - otp_secret encrypted at enrollment via encryption.encrypt(), decrypted before pyotp.TOTP() at verify — column widened to varchar(255) - cancel_event, SECRET_KEY, DOM credentials, rate limiting bugs marked fixed in bug_report.md - RateLimitIntegrationTest added to test.py (skipped if server not running), standalone test_rate_limit.py removed
● Implement Security Profiles UI — CRUD, encrypted credentials, connection test

Complete Phase 2: inventory CRUD, security profiles UI, operator zone
Operator zone (operator_base.html, dashboard, account, security, inventory): - Security profiles: full CRUD + test connection (Netmiko via Device class) - Inventory: card grid with Simple Icons vendor badges, FortiGate hover tooltip, NrSelect dropdown, variable attributes expand section (9 fields incl. vrfs list), security profile drag-assign from split-view modal - Inventory backend: create, edit, delete, bulk_assign — all ownership-guarded
Schema: - Inventory.var_maps JSON column, Device.extra dict, VariableMapping.index nullable int (positional vrfs substitution)
Form validation site-wide: - novalidate + .field-error divs with contextual messages on all forms - CSS :has() rule handles password inputs inside .pw-group wrappers - Shake-on-submit JS + validation CSS added to base.html (covers login page)
Docs: workplan and architecture updated, Phase 2 marked complete

● Implement variable mappings: UI, backend, schema (3.1)
- variable_mappings.html: card grid, add/edit/delete modals, split-view drag-assign with eligible pool filtered by truthy attribute value - var_mapping_to_devices join table: many-to-many VariableMapping <-> Inventory - UniqueConstraint(token, user_id) on VariableMapping, cascade delete on devices - Validator: validate_var_map_inner_token, validate_var_map_property_name, validate_var_index (static, return tuple[bool, str|None]) - Routes: GET /mappings, create, edit, delete, bulk_assign with ownership and eligibility guards - UUID converter on all ID routes app-wide, manual casts removed - DB: index column on variable_mappings, unique constraint, var_mapping_to_devices table, index dropped from rollout_sessions

Add CSV import to inventory and variable mappings (3.1, 3.1b)
- variable_mappings.html: card grid, drag-assign split modal, NrSelect attribute picker, resolved value shown in drag cards - var_mapping_to_devices join table, UniqueConstraint(token, user_id), cascade delete on VariableMapping.devices - Validator: 3 static mapping validators returning (bool, str|None) - Routes: /mappings GET/create/edit/delete/bulk_assign with ownership and eligibility guards (truthy attribute value check) - UUID converter on all ID routes app-wide, manual casts removed - inventory/import_csv: multipart upload, temp file handling, InputParser.csv_to_inventory, logger queue drain, both temp files cleaned up in finally block - Import CSV button + modal added to inventory page

Fix innerHTML XSS in rollout log output
html.escape() applied to user-controlled message content in RolloutLogger._msg() before HTML color wrapping. Prevents device hostnames or command output containing HTML from executing in the browser. Bug report updated — one open item remaining (SSE completion signal).

Implemented device-aware variable substitution and completed the new rollout execution pipeline.
Core changes:
Variable Mapping - Added runtime substitution support in RolloutEngine. - Device objects now carry: - `extra` device attributes (from Inventory.var_maps) - `var_map_subs` mapping tokens to attribute lookups. - Implemented `_substitute_commands()` to resolve tokens per device before execution. - Supports indexed attributes (e.g. VRF lists). - Substitution applied consistently during both push and verification phases.
Device Construction - Extended `Device.from_inventory()` to translate ORM relationships into runtime structures. - Mappings from `VariableMapping` are converted into token → (property, index) dictionaries.
Rollout Engine - Push stage now executes device-specific command lists. - Verification stage updated to evaluate substituted commands. - Removed unnecessary deepcopy usage for command lists.
Rollout Web Backend - Implemented new `/new_rollout` and `/new_start_rollout` routes. - Allows selecting inventory devices and submitting commands via text input or file upload. - Builds runtime `Device` objects via InputParser. - Submits rollout jobs through the orchestrator.
Architecture - Maintained clean boundary between ORM models and runtime execution layer. - Device substitution logic remains independent of database access. - Rollout jobs continue to be managed via the in-memory orchestrator registry.
Documentation / Readability - Added structured comments explaining rollout route stages.
● "Implement Phase 3.2: multi-platform rollout, active jobs screen, log streaming, rollback, job metadata audit trail with pg_cron retention, and results page"

Phase 3.4 — audit trail, results enhancements, log file infrastructure
- Add AuditLog ORM model with 90-day pg_cron retention - Instrument 21 routes with audit() writes (auth, user mgmt, inventory, security profiles, variable mappings, rollout lifecycle) - Add /admin/audit filterable log viewer with FortiGate-style gear per row - Remove legacy upload/rollout routes and templates (pre-Phase 3.2) - Fix admin panel back button pointing to old upload route - Wire RolloutLogger to LOGS_DIR (src/../logs/) with job_id+timestamp naming - Add Download Log and See Commands buttons to results page - Add client-side LCS diff modal for comparing commands between two jobs

Device-level concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger fully thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock added, get_buffer_snapshot() for race-free SSE replay.
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users collapsible sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge on other users' rows. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, and log download.

Phase 3.6 — concurrency, admin all-users view, audit fix, UI polish
Two-layer concurrency: ThreadPoolExecutor in _push_config and _verify, _push_device/_verify_device extracted. RolloutLogger thread-safe: _buffer private, _buffer_lock + _log_lock, get_buffer_snapshot().
Admin all-users toggle on active_jobs and results: split view with My Jobs / Other Users sections, per-section headers and filters, owner badge. Admin bypasses ownership checks on cancel, stream, log download.
AuditLog.detail JSONB column added (was accepted by audit() helper but never stored or surfaced in the View Detail modal).
Dashboard buttons: Launch Rollout solid cyan fill, other actions cyan outline. Sidebar reorganised into three labelled sections — Operation, Management, Observability — with Admin Panel inside Observability.

tests: enable and adapt full unit test suite to current architecture
Re-enable all _DISABLED test classes and adapt them to the Phase 2/3 architecture. Fix RolloutLogger constructor usage (logfile= param removed), update _push_config assertions for (cancel_signal, push_results) tuple return, update _verify for ThreadPoolExecutor-based API (cancel removed), update run() assertions for list[DeviceResultDict] return type. Fix _server_reachable bug (was returning True on ConnectionRefusedError, skipping rate limit test incorrectly).
82 tests passing, 1 skipped (rate limit integration — requires live server). webapp.py and cli.py intentionally uncovered — next session.

feat(inventory): TCP connection test on device creation
Add device modal now requires a connection test before saving. A 'Test Connection' button (grey) fires POST /inventory/test_connection, which runs Validator.test_tcp_port against the supplied IP and port. On success the button turns green ('Confirm') and a status pill shows the result; on failure it turns red ('Save Anyway') so the user can still persist an unreachable device. Editing IP or port after a test resets the button to prevent confirming a stale result.

fix + feat: first-rollout fixes, results page overhaul, edit-device test button
Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() → data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e → | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw " quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test → green Confirm / red Save Anyway

Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() -> data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e -> | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test -> green Confirm / red Save Anyway

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before Bug fixes from first EVE-NG live test: - core: treat ReadTimeout as success when commands were already sent — hostname rename changes the prompt mid-session, netmiko loses detection after the config is applied, not before - core: fix "_commands" literal typo in verify summary log output - core: suppress red/yellow verify summary lines when count is 0 - webapp: fix data.get_queue() -> data.get() typo in security_test route - active_jobs: drain queue after buffer replay to prevent duplicate SSE log lines; pause page auto-refresh while log panel is open
Results page — See Commands and diff selection were both silently broken: - Fix | tojson | e -> | tojson | forceescape on data-commands attributes; tojson returns Markup so | e was a no-op, leaving raw quotes that truncated the HTML attribute at the first JSON string delimiter - Fix compare mode hiding all rows (diffModeBtn carried filter-btn class but no data-filter — filter handler set filter=undefined, all rows hidden) - Add job ID copy button (clipboard API, check icon flash on copy)
Inventory: add Test Connection three-state button to Edit Device modal, mirroring the Add Device modal — grey Test -> green Confirm / red Save Anyway
